record.field:
Scans custom modules and Studio customizations, produces reviewable developer tasks, and generates Claude-ready prompts for safe code fixes.
Capabilities: • Scan Python models, XML views, menus, actions, security files, manifests • Detect Studio-created ir.ui.view records (module = studio_customization) • Create mythos.developer.task records for human review • Generate structured Claude prompts with branch, target, issue, fix, and warnings
Safety rules: • Never auto-writes code • Never modifies Studio views automatically • Never touches BOQ/Costing/Execution without explicit task approval • All tasks start in Draft state and require human review before any action
